ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "duration_ms" REAL /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content (true/false) */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track (0 to 1) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the track (0 to 1) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Average loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track (0 to 1) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the track (0 to 1) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track (0 to 1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track (0 to 1) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track (0 to 1) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was released */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album to which the track belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Pop, Rock) */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "primary_genre" INTEGER /* Indicates if the genre is the primary genre for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., listener, artist, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the service */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription the user has (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the track */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., play, download) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the track (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from where the track was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended track */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., algorithm, user-curated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being analyzed */,
  "user_engagement" REAL /* User engagement score (0 to 1) */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the track has been played */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the track (0 to 5) */,
  "user_engagement_trend" TEXT /* Trend in user engagement (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "play_count_trend" TEXT /* Trend in play count (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "average_rating_trend" TEXT /* Trend in average rating (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary genre associated with the artist */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the artist joined the service */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the artist's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the album was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary genre associated with the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover art */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)
